name: Address
description: Maps a hostname to an IPv4 address.

name: IPv6 Address
description: Maps a hostname to an IPv6 address.

name: Canonical Name
description: Alias of one name to another. The DNS lookup continues with the new name.

name: Mail Exchanger
description: Specifies mail servers responsible for accepting email for a domain. Includes a priority value (lower = higher priority).

name: Name Server
description: Delegates a DNS zone to use the given authoritative name servers.

name: Pointer
description: Used for reverse DNS lookups — maps an IP address back to a hostname. Lives in the .in-addr.arpa or .ip6.arpa zone.

name: Start of Authority
description: Stores administrative information about a DNS zone: primary nameserver, email of the zone admin, zone serial number, and timers.

name: Text
description: Holds arbitrary text. Used for SPF, DKIM, DMARC, domain verification tokens, and other machine-readable data.

name: Service Locator
description: Specifies the location (hostname and port) of servers for specified services. Format: priority weight port target.

name: Certification Authority Authorization
description: Specifies which Certificate Authorities (CAs) are allowed to issue SSL/TLS certificates for a domain.

name: DomainKeys Identified Mail
description: Stored as a TXT record at a selector subdomain (_domainkey). Contains the public key used to verify DKIM email signatures.

name: Sender Policy Framework
description: Published as a TXT record specifying which mail servers are permitted to send email on behalf of a domain.

name: Domain-based Message Authentication, Reporting & Conformance
description: Published as a TXT record at _dmarc subdomain. Defines policy for SPF/DKIM failures and reporting email address.

name: Alias (ANAME)
description: Non-standard record (DNS provider-specific) that allows CNAME-like behaviour at the zone apex (@). Resolves to the IP of the target at query time.

name: Naming Authority Pointer
description: Used by DDDS (Dynamic Delegation Discovery System) applications such as SIP URI routing and ENUM (telephone number to URI mapping).

name: HTTPS Service Binding
description: A newer record type (SVCB subtype) that helps browsers connect to HTTPS services more efficiently, including ECH and alt-svc parameters.

name: Delegation Signer
description: Part of DNSSEC. Contains a hash of a child zone's DNSKEY record, establishing the chain of trust between parent and child zones.

name: DNS Key
description: Part of DNSSEC. Stores the public key used to verify DNSSEC signatures (RRSIG records) in a zone.

name: TLS Authentication
description: Part of DANE. Associates a TLS server certificate or public key with a domain name, allowing pinning without CAs.

name: Location
description: Stores geographic location of a host (latitude, longitude, altitude, precision). Rarely used in practice.
